final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] parallel_out);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (reset) begin
            parallel_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            parallel_out <= {parallel_out[2:0], serial_in};
        end
    end

endmodule
